title: Headsteal by Dsis Gaming
description: Headstel Plugin with mob head ability
body:
# 🔥 PSD1 HeadSteal Plugin 

---

Description PSD1 HeadSteal is a hardcore survival plugin that raises the stakes of PvP by linking a player’s life to their heads. Every kill matters. Every death hurts. When a player kills another player, they steal one head (life) from the victim and gain it themselves. When a player loses all their heads, they are eliminated from the server, making survival intense, strategic, and thrilling. This plugin is perfect for SMPs, Lifesteal-style servers, and competitive survival worlds. ⚔️ Core Features 🧠 Head Stealing System Kill a player → Gain 1 head Die → Lose 1 head ☠️ Permanent Elimination Players with 0 heads are banned/eliminated from the server. ❤️ Dynamic Max Health Each head increases max health (configurable hearts per head). 💀 PvP-Based Progression No grinding—only skill, strategy, and combat decide survival. ⚙️ Fully Configurable Starting heads Hearts per head Death punishment Ban or spectator mode on elimination 🛡️ Anti-Exploit Protection Prevents farming heads using alts or repeated kills (optional). 🎮 Perfect For Lifesteal SMPs Hardcore PvP servers Competitive friend servers YouTube / Streaming SMP series 🧩 Plugin Identity Lightweight & optimized Easy to install Works with vanilla-style gameplay Designed for long-term survival worlds
